recommendations.title: Lucca's World
recommendations.overview: Determined to help her son, who has cerebral palsy, Bárbara takes her family to India for an experimental treatment.

recommendations.title: Pin

recommendations.title: The Ladies Man
recommendations.overview: Because of his salacious language, late-night radio advice-show host Leon Phelps, along with his sweet and loyal producer Julie, is fired from his Chicago gig. Leon gets a letter from a former lover promising a life of wealth, but he doesn't know who

recommendations.title: The Last Will and Testament of Rosalind Leigh
recommendations.overview: The story of Leon, an antiques collector who inherits a house from his estranged mother only to discover that she had been living in a shrine devoted to a mysterious cult. Soon, Leon comes to suspect that his mother's oppressive spirit still lingers

recommendations.title: That's What I Am
recommendations.overview: A coming-of-age story that follows 12-year-old Andy Nichol, a bright student who, like most kids his age, will do anything to avoid conflict for fear of suffering overwhelming ridicule and punishment from his junior high school peers.

recommendations.title: Afire
recommendations.overview: Self-important author Leon joins his best friend on a summer holiday near the Baltic Sea to complete his novel. When they arrive, they find their house is already occupied by a carefree woman who challenges Leon to open up. Meanwhile, forest wildfire

recommendations.title: Above the Rim
recommendations.overview: Story of a promising high school basketball star and his relationships with two brothers, one a drug dealer and the other a former basketball star fallen on hard times and now employed as a security guard.

recommendations.title: Pride
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a group of LGBT activists decide to raise money to support the National Union of Mineworkers during their lengthy strike. There is only one problem: the Union seems embarrassed to receive their support.
